name: jaunt
description: Build and maintain Jaunt spec-driven Python projects with guarded generated files, workspace-aware status, and CLI-backed workflows.

interface.longDescription: Use Jaunt from Codex with workspace-aware build, conversion, doctor, and first-build review workflows. Bundled hooks summarize freshness and block direct edits to generated Python and provenance-headed stubs.
defaultPrompt: Check this Jaunt workspace before I edit a spec.
Build the stale Jaunt modules and verify the result.
Run Jaunt doctor and explain the findings.
